creator: Alexander@Leidinger.net
text:
Hi,

please make sure your ports (GTK, gnupg, ...) are up to date. Also
recompile SC after making sure your ports are up-to-date. Note, please
read UPDATING, it has some stuff to say about gnupg.

Here the pgp and trayicon stuff works just fine (for the other stuff I
didn't tested, but at least the smime plugin lods just fine).

Bye,
Alexander.

-- 
 Adelai: A package is just a box until it's delivered.
